## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Configure SDK with...
2. Call method...
3. Observe error...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or logs if available.

## Environment

- **SDK Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Platform**: [e.g. iOS 17.0 / macOS 14.0]
- **Xcode Version**: [e.g. 15.4]
- **Swift Version**: [e.g. 5.9]
- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 15 Simulator / MacBook Pro M2]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or relevant information.
